author: chfast
content: <@755913785620824175> <@968526635735326741>  There are two interpretations to the initial tx gas inclusion check. https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2892. As this is now covered by EEST, I expect some EVMs to fail new tests.

author: misilva73
content: We discussed this some time ago and decided to simplify this check. I think we should use the EIP version.

author: chfast
content: Can you check if what I modified is what you want.

author: spencer_tb
content: What we do in EELS atm is not what the EIP text says, and that PR aligns the 2 from my understanding

author: misilva73
content: Yes, your PR looks correct to me. I will comment there

author: chfast
content: Should I also update existing tests to match the modified implementation?
